name: Lavender-Pepper Pears (Hh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the lemon juice over the pears.
2. Combine the lavender and pepper and sprinkle over the pears.
3. Serve on a plate with a knife and fork.
Note: Adding a wedge of Italian Fontina or other mild semi-soft cheese as an accompaniment takes the dessert out of the "Heart-Healthy" category, but makes it a "More Betterly".
